# Beijing TRS Information Technology Co., Ltd.

**Python Data Mining Intern** | July 2025 - August 2025

**TL;DR:** Practiced enterprise data mining workflows, performing exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, and machine learning modeling (XGBoost, Random Forest, SVM) for housing price prediction and fraud detection.

## 🎯 Objectives
To learn and implement full-lifecycle data mining processes (data cleaning, feature extraction, scaling, modeling, and evaluation) under real business scenarios. Expected to build regression models for accommodation price forecasting and classification models for credit card fraud detection.

## 💻 Tech Stack
Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, Matplotlib, Jupyter Notebook

## 🛠️ Core Contributions
* **Data Processing & Feature Engineering:** Cleaned noisy raw datasets containing thousands of transaction logs. Addressed missing values, scaling variances, and categorical encoding. Developed temporal indicators and feature cross-products to enhance model input layers.
* **Supervised Machine Learning Modeling:** Built regression and classification models using Linear Regression, Random Forest, Support Vector Machines (SVM), and XGBoost. Utilized Grid Search and Cross-Validation (K-Fold) to tune hyperparameters.
* **EDA & Statistical Visualization:** Generated statistical plots, correlation matrix heatmaps, and feature importance rankings using Matplotlib and Seaborn in Jupyter Notebook to verify model interpretability.
* **Project Deliverables:** Successfully executed two core projects: Accommodation Price Regression and Credit Card Fraud Classification. Authored structured analytics reports detailing F1-Score, Precision-Recall curves, and ROC-AUC metrics.

## 🏆 Key Results & Quantified Impact
* Built a fraud detection model achieving a ROC-AUC score of over 95% on the test set, effectively minimizing false alarms.
* Programmed reusable modular Python pipelines for automated dataset preprocessing and training evaluations.
* Delivered clear, structured business-ready reports that were highly rated by senior technical mentors.
